category_sources: source_facts.description says portable abstraction of hierarchical topology of modern architectures; official Open MPI hwloc page describes hardware locality topology discovery and binding.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hwloc; official Open MPI project page uses hwloc and Portable Hardware Locality.
docs_sources: Official Open MPI hwloc site has a dedicated documentation page with versioned HTML/PDF manuals and the main project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Open MPI hwloc page states the GIT repository is available, and the official GitHub repository is open-mpi/hwloc.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Open MPI page identify hardware topology, CPU/memory binding, NUMA, and command-line utilities.
